isolation.notes: Single validator browser session; no shared mutable test data used

steps.action: Open http://localhost:3102 and set viewport to 768x1024
steps.observed: Viewport set to 768x1024 and page rendered

steps.expected: Single-column stacked layout with swap widget inline
steps.observed: Single-column layout shown; swap widget content appears inline below primary content

steps.expected: Horizontal padding 20px and no horizontal overflow
steps.observed: Layout container computed padding-left/right = 20px; flex-direction = column; document clientWidth=768 and scrollWidth=768

evidence.network: UI-only assertion; navigation to http://localhost:3102 succeeded

assertions.title: Nav tabs use correct font size and colors

steps.action: Set viewport to 1440x900 and reload page
steps.observed: Trade and Explore tabs rendered in navbar

steps.action: Read computed styles for Trade (active) and Explore (inactive)
steps.expected: Font size matches reference; active=neutral1; inactive=neutral2
steps.observed: Both tabs font-size=15px; Trade color=rgb(255, 255, 255); Explore color=rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65)

steps.action: Hover Explore tab and inspect transition
steps.observed: Explore transition-property=color, transition-duration=0.125s (ease-in-out); hover color changes to rgb(255, 255, 255)

evidence.network: UI-only assertion; no API/network dependency required for this style check

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned no captured entries during this visual rerun
frictions.resolution: Used direct computed-style/layout inspection and screenshots as primary evidence for UI assertions
